hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4); if [ -z "$file" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$file" in */convex/crm/*) if grep -q "from.*convex/gabinet" "$file" 2>/dev/null; then echo "CROSS-MODULE VIOLATION: $file imports from convex/gabinet/. Use platform layer instead." >&2; exit 1; fi ;; */convex/gabinet/*) if grep -q "from.*convex/crm" "$file" 2>/dev/null; then echo "CROSS-MODULE VIOLATION: $file imports from convex/crm/. Use platform layer instead." >&2; exit 1; fi ;; */components/crm/*) if grep -q "from.*components/gabinet" "$file" 2>/dev/null; then echo "CROSS-MODULE VIOLATION: $file imports from components/gabinet/. Use platform layer instead." >&2; exit 1; fi ;; */components/gabinet/*) if grep -q "from.*components/crm" "$file" 2>/dev/null; then echo "CROSS-MODULE VIOLATION: $file imports from components/crm/. Use platform layer instead." >&2; exit 1; fi ;; esac; exit 0'

PostToolUse.description: Enforce module import boundaries — no cross-imports between crm and gabinet
